creator: dr.klepp@gmx.at
text:
The dma config files are read from /usr/local/dma instead of /etc/dma.

The dma manpage says:
"These two files are stored per default in /etc/dma."

But /etc/dma ia ignored. When /usr/local/dma is missing, dma uses default settings. It does not use the config files from /etc/dma.
